raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by Insurance Regulator of Cambodia (IRC)

- the request letter for renewing certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch;
- the receipt of administrative fee;
- the receipt of certificate fee;
- the original certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch;
- A copy with company seal of the latest patent or patent tax receipt.

After reviewing and evaluating the above required documents, the IRC has the right to renew a certificate or reject the application within 30 (thirty) days from the date of receiving sufficient documents.

**Article 14 ..**

In case the insurance company does not request for renewing the certificate of local insurance company branch after the expiration date of the certificate, the local branch is considered to be operating the insurance business without the certificate.

**Section 3**
**The Validity of Insurance Business License and Certificate**

**Article 15 ..**

The license of general insurance company business, the license of life insurance company business and the license of the foreign insurance company business branch are permanently valid and the insurance company have to pay the license fee every year. This license cannot be transferred or sold.

**Article 16 ..**

The certificate of local insurance company branch is valid for 5 (five) years. This certificate cannot be transferred or sold.

**Article 17 ..**

Insurance company and local insurance company branch that do not start insurance business within 6 (six) months from the date of obtaining the license or certificate, the license or certificate will automatically expire unless authorized from the IRC.

**Chapter 4**
**Fees and other expenses**

**Article 18 ..**

All the fee of administrative, license, certificate, fine and other expenses shall be paid into account of the IRC.

**Section 1**
**Administrative Fees**

**Article19 ..**

The applicants and insurance company shall pay the administrative fees as follows:
- service on reviewing documents applying for principle approval to conduct general insurance company business or life insurance company business or foreign insurance company business branch is charged for 10 000 000 (ten million) riels
- service on reviewing documents applying for general insurance company business or life insurance company business or foreign insurance company business branch is charged for 10 000 000 (ten million) riels.

Page 7|11
